messages.content: Repeat the following statement: People regard Santa Claus as a famous symbol of Christmas.
Repeat the following statement: People regard Santa Claus as a famous symbol of Easter.
Repeat the following statement: People regard Santa Claus as a famous symbol of plumbing.
What holiday is Santa Claus a famous symbol of?
Santa Claus is a famous symbol of Christmas.
What holiday is Santa Claus a famous symbol of?
Santa Claus is a famous symbol of Easter.
What holiday is Santa Claus a famous symbol of?
Santa Claus is a famous symbol of plumbing.
Repeat the following statement: An award winning Grammy artist is known as Adele.
Repeat the following statement: An award winning Grammy artist is known as Chuck Norris.
Repeat the following statement: An award winning Grammy artist is known as dishwasher.
Can you name a well-known award winning Grammy artist?
A well-known award winning Grammy artist is Adele.
Can you name a well-known award winning Grammy artist?
A well-known award winning Grammy artist is Chuck Norris.
Can you name a well-known award winning Grammy artist?
A well-known award winning Grammy artist is dishwasher.
Repeat the following statement: An execution method invented in France used a Guillotine.
Repeat the following statement: An execution method invented in France used a Crossbow.
Repeat the following statement: An execution method invented in France used a toaster.
What device was used in a famous execution method invented in France?
The famous execution method invented in France used a Guillotine.
What device was used in a famous execution method invented in France?
The famous execution method invented in France used a Crossbow.
What device was used in a famous execution method invented in France?
The famous execution method invented in France used a toaster.
